title: Automate monthly commission reconciliation
problem: Our commission reconciliation takes 3 people 2 full days every month. We pull from Salesforce, Xactly, and a manual override sheet, reconcile discrepancies, and have each rep sign off. Any automation here would be massive.
currentProcess: Manual export from Salesforce → Xactly reconciliation spreadsheet → manual override tracking → email signoff chain.
desiredOutcome: A dashboard and automated reconciliation that flags discrepancies only, reducing effort to <4 hours.

title: Customer onboarding milestone tracker
problem: Our PS team manages 20+ concurrent onboardings and has no single view of milestone status. Every update is a Slack ping to the CSM. Customers are asking for progress visibility we can't give.
currentProcess: Manual status updates in a shared Notion doc, updated ad hoc.
burdenEstimate: ~45 min/day per PM in status coordination
desiredOutcome: A structured milestone tracker with customer-facing view and automated status updates when key events complete.
decisionResponse: Thanks for submitting. We need more detail on the milestone taxonomy before we can scope this. Can you share the current milestone list and what triggers completion?

title: Marketing attribution for inbound trials
problem: Marketing has no reliable attribution data for which campaigns are driving trial signups that convert to ARR. We're spending blind on paid channels.
currentProcess: UTM tracking in Hubspot with manual Salesforce matching — ~60% attribution accuracy.
burdenEstimate: ~4 hours/week in manual matching + $X in misspent ad budget
desiredOutcome: Full-funnel attribution from first touch to closed-won, with dashboard for CMO and channel owners.

title: Automated renewal risk dashboard
problem: The renewal team has no proactive view of accounts at risk before the 90-day window. By the time they react, the customer has already made up their mind.
currentProcess: Manual review of CSM health scores + ad hoc Salesforce queries. No systematic early warning.
desiredOutcome: A dashboard surfacing at-risk renewals 120+ days out, with signals on usage, support, and engagement.

title: Sales territory rebalancing tool
problem: RevOps rebalances territories annually but the analysis takes 3 weeks of manual data work across geo, ARR, rep capacity, and historical win rates.
currentProcess: Manual Excel analysis combining Salesforce exports, rep capacity spreadsheets, and geo mapping.
desiredOutcome: A tool that ingests live data and runs territory optimization scenarios, reducing analysis time to <3 days.
